nasb.text: and the priest shall offer them, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering. So the priest shall make atonement on his behalf before the Lord because of his discharge.

esv.text: And the priest shall use them, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering. And the priest shall make atonement for him before the Lord for his discharge.

cnv.text: 祭司要把牠們獻上，一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭；祭司因那人的異常排泄，要在耶和華面前為他贖罪。

ccb.text: 一只作赎罪祭，一只作燔祭。这样，祭司便在耶和华面前为他的漏症赎了罪。
